name_en: Council of Nationalist-Religious Activists of Iran
description: The Council of Nationalist-Religious Activists (Melli-Mazhabi) is a political organization in Iran established in 2000 by members closely associated with the [Freedom Movement of Iran](/orgs/freedom-movement-of-iran). It carries forward the nationalist-religious political tradition that blends Islamic values with democratic nationalism. The group faced a government crackdown shortly after its founding, with dozens of members arrested and tried.
editorial_notes: Splinter/offshoot of FMI. Founded 2000. Crackdown same year.
